detail.description:
Stressed Out? Let Puppet Bang! Smash Your Worries Away!
Life got you down? Annoying boss, endless bills, or just a bad day? Don’t hold it in—let it out! Puppet Bang! is your private emotional recycling bin. No rules, no limits—just pure, unadulterated destruction!

🛠️ YOUR ULTIMATE ARSENAL
Classic Hits: Fists, baseball bats, and even giant frying pans!

Heavy Firepower: Grenades, C4, and Nuclear Warheads—fill your screen with epic explosions.

High-Tech Gear: Lasers, orbital cannons, and freeze

eventMentions.text: every time i try to play a new round it keeps popping up as an add.
bad bad bad game it hacked my phone and lucky for me i knew how to fix it
